limitations: Menu is presented as a build-your-own format (style + protein + add-ons + condiment) rather than fixed named dishes; normalized records below represent each selectable component rather than every possible combination.

Restaurant explicitly discloses (footnote ***) that products at this location may contain or come into contact with PEANUTS or other allergens — a facility-wide disclosure, not a per-dish declaration. This is carried into each dish's cross_contact field rather than left as plain 'unknown', since the restaurant did provide relevant facility information.
